title: About · Your Name
description: A short introduction page for the starter template.
heroText: This page shows how a second page can be driven from editable JSON content instead of hard-coded Astro page copy.

cards.title: Why it exists
cards.text: The goal is to let non-technical users update real page copy through a browser-based editor, while still publishing through Git and Cloudflare Pages.

cards.title: How to reuse it
cards.text: Replace this content with your own story, background, goals, services, or portfolio narrative, and keep the page component structure reusable.
